title: nissolia ruddiae
intro: Nissolia ruddiae, also known as Nissolia, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, characterized by its yellow flowers and slender stems. The medicinal properties of Nissolia ruddiae include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Nissolia ruddiae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The herbal preparations of Nissolia ruddiae typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, or using the plant's extracts in traditional medicine formulas.
